---
title: "Welcome!"
format: html
editor: visual
---

Welcome to the Winter 2026 STA380H5 site!

Most of the notes will be posted on this website instead of Quercus/Canvas. [Ben Recht said it best](https://www.argmin.net/p/machine-learning-evaluation-a-syllabus):

*"Using Canvas means that course content lives behind an obnoxious campus IT firewall."*

While you're here, please browse some amazing final course projects made by students this semester.

[Project: Monte Carlo Simulation of a Hypothesis Test of Binomially Distributed Samples](http://valeriepan-mc-simulation-of-hypothesis-test-for-binomial-prop.share.connect.posit.cloud/) by Junyi Hou, Siling Cheng, Feiyang Xue, Tianhong Shen, and Valerie Pan.

[Project: Monte Carlo Study of the Bias–Variance Tradeoff in Regression Models](https://019cea29-16b6-3560-2cce-56feb47d4a51.share.connect.posit.cloud/) by Jizheng Huang, Kai Rui Zhu, Tianchen Xu, and Victor Jiang.

[Project: VaR calculator for Stock Portfolio through Monte Carlo and Geometric Brownian Motion](https://huangjeffrey-varmcproject.share.connect.posit.cloud/) by Jeffrey Huang and Sun Jia Wei.

Brief disclaimer: groups had a minimum of 4 students. Some final group sizes are smaller as some students opted out of the project in the middle of the course.
